## Purpose 
update dependencies:
```
    Updating `~/clima/ClimaCoupler.jl/experiments/ClimaEarth/Project.toml`
  [29b5916a] ↑ ClimaAnalysis v0.5.14 ⇒ v0.5.15
  [d414da3d] ↑ ClimaCore v0.14.27 ⇒ v0.14.28
  [08f4d4ce] ↑ ClimaLand v0.15.11 ⇒ v0.15.12
  [5c42b081] ↑ ClimaParams v0.10.23 ⇒ v0.10.24
  [b3f4f4ca] ↑ ClimaUtilities v0.1.23 ⇒ v0.1.24
  [85f8d34a] ↑ NCDatasets v0.14.6 ⇒ v0.14.7
  [0bca4576] ↑ SciMLBase v2.77.0 ⇒ v2.79.0
```

Also updates a bucket function call for compatibility with ClimaLand v0.15.12. This will fix the nightly AMIP error we saw last night.
title: update deps, fix bucket compatibility
